chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4824 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) D/O matter 1. For hearing on CMA No.2850/2025 (Restoration) 26-03-2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Faheem Raza, advocate for respondent department. Mr. Faheem Raza, advocate holds brief for Mr. Ghulam Asghar, advocate for respondent. 1. By consent this application is allowed and the petition is restored. The respective learned counsel jointly state that since show cause has been issued herein, the same be contested before the issuing authority. It is stated that the notice shall be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. It is stated that in view of the foregoing the petitions may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
